overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city showing a character walking through a neon-lit downtown district. The character crosses streets, walks along sidewalks with digital billboards, and explores elevated pedestrian plazas featuring glass floors and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with holographic crosswalk signals

events.description: crosswalk signal changes from red WAIT to green WALK projection on street
character begins crossing the street from sidewalk to sidewalk
steps onto concrete sidewalk from crosswalk, leaving the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the futuristic crosswalk then walking across the intersection following the green WALK hologram projected on the ground

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with large circular portrait billboards and NCN signage
multi-level steel and glass pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead
glowing green and red WALK/WAIT text projected onto the street surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection with a character waiting at a holographic crosswalk. The crosswalk signal changes to green WALK, and the character crosses the street while a black sedan drives past. The NCN media building with circular billboards dominates the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian sidewalk with neon accent lighting and palm tree planters

events.description: slight turn to follow the curving sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians in a futuristic commercial district with neon-lit curbs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: glowing blue light strips embedded along the edge of the sidewalk
large cylindrical planters with palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees in planters and glowing blue neon strips. The NCN building recedes into the background as the camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corner approaching elevated plaza with tiered concrete architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering glass skyscrapers and elevated walkways
begins ascending concrete stairs into the elevated plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the street corner, looking up at the architecture, then ascending wide concrete stairs into an elevated pedestrian plaza

entered.detail: tall reflective glass tower with greenery visible on balconies
futuristic information kiosk with glowing blue text displays
wide concrete staircase leading up to the elevated plaza level
large digital billboard with purple neon text WET DREAM

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a corner and looks up at a towering glass skyscraper with vertical gardens. The camera ascends wide concrete stairs into an elevated plaza, passing a digital directory screen. The WET DREAM billboard becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with transparent glass floor section overlooking garden

events.description: steps onto transparent glass floor revealing rocks and vegetation below with reflective surface
descends short steps from glass floor section back to concrete plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking across a transparent glass floor showing a reflective garden space below, then continuing through the shaded plaza area

notable_agents.action: child in yellow pants standing at the edge of the glass floor looking down

entered.detail: transparent glass walkway revealing rocks, grass and tree reflections below
futuristic purple kiosk structures with glowing interfaces

segments.scene_description: The character explores an elevated plaza featuring a striking transparent glass floor that reveals a garden below with rocks and reflections. The WET DREAM billboard is prominent on the right. The character passes a child standing at the glass edge and descends steps into a lower plaza area with purple vending kiosks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with amphitheater seating and large advertisement displays

events.description: approaches and begins ascending wide amphitheater-style stairs
passes NPCs sitting and resting on the concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit open plaza and ascending wide stairs toward a massive billboard, passing pedestrians and people resting on the steps

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on stairs, one leaning against the concrete wall

entered.detail: massive white advertisement display for nicola brand featuring a VR headset image
wide concrete steps with integrated benches where people are sitting
commercial building with prominent green neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open sunlit plaza and approaches wide amphitheater stairs. Two people are sitting on the steps to the right. The character ascends toward a massive nicola VR billboard that dominates the view, while the glass skyscraper shifts to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon-lit street intersection up into a series of expansive, multi-level futuristic plazas. It begins at a holographic crosswalk where the character crosses the street past a black sedan and the circular billboards of the NCN media building. As the character moves along a curved sidewalk lined with palm trees and blue neon strips, the camera shifts focus from the receding NCN building toward a towering glass skyscraper with vertical gardens. The scene then ascends wide concrete stairs and passes a digital directory to enter an elevated plaza, where the camera glides across a transparent glass floor revealing a garden below before descending toward purple vending kiosks. Finally, the movement traverses a sunlit open area and climbs amphitheater stairs, turning toward a massive Nicola VR billboard as the glass skyscraper shifts to the side of the frame.
